title: 5 Amazing Facts About Space
script: Did you know that a day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus? Let me blow your mind with 5 incredible space facts. Number 1: Venus rotates so slowly that it takes 243 Earth days to complete one rotation, but only 225 days to orbit the Sun. Number 2: If you could drive a car upwards at 60 mph, you'd reach space in just one hour. Number 3: The footprints on the Moon will be there for 100 million years because there's no wind to blow them away. Number 4: One million Earths could fit inside the Sun. And Number 5: There are more stars in the universe than grains of sand on all the beaches on Earth. Which fact amazed you the most? Comment below! #Space #ScienceFacts #Shorts
description: Mind-blowing space facts that will make you see the universe differently!
